failure_analysis.description_gap_detail: The project description does not specify the exact placeholder text for the input fields (albumName and releaseYear) and the exact label text for the labels (albumName, releaseYear, genre, and favorite). The test code block checks for specific placeholder and label texts, but these are not mentioned in the project description.
failure_analysis.implementation_detail: The generated HTML code does not include placeholder attributes for the input fields, and the label texts do not match the expected texts in the test code block.
failure_analysis.fix_suggestion: Update the project description to include the exact placeholder text for the input fields and the exact label text for the labels. Then, update the generated HTML code to include the placeholder attributes for the input fields and the correct label texts.
failure_analysis.code_snippet: The relevant code snippet from the generated HTML is: <label for="albumName">Album Name:</label> <input type="text" id="albumName" required> and <label for="releaseYear">Release Year:</label> <input type="number" id="releaseYear" required>. The placeholder attributes are missing, and the label texts do not match the expected texts in the test code block.
failure_analysis.name: Verify Placeholder And Label Texts
